name: site-scaffold
description: Tinyland house-style agent skills. Land softly in any tinyland repo, classify its role, spawn or repair sister sites, and run cache-first Bazel work through GloriousFlywheel.

plugins.name: scaffold-core
plugins.description: Six tinyland skills bundled as one plugin: tinyland-whoami (repo-role classifier), tinyland-spawn-sister-site (template a new spoke), tinyland-scaffold-doctor (drift audit), tinyland-repo-contract (house-style baseline), tinyland-static-spoke (per-spoke customization), tinyland-flywheel-bazel (cache-first Bazel + RBE).
